evidence: Baseline=189, Final=499, Growth=+310 in ~120s (~2.6/s). All entries are [VAL_EXPIRED] — opportunities expiring before execution.
expected: DLQ growth near 0 during healthy pipeline operation
actual: 310 new DLQ entries during smoke test — 2.6/s growth rate. Root cause: coordinator lag (28K+ pending opportunities).
recommendation: 1) Increase simulationTtlMultiplier for simulation mode. 2) Consider having execution-engine silently ACK expired opportunities instead of routing to DLQ — expiration is normal pipeline signal in high-throughput mode.
